description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test and Docker build that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a single ubuntu-latest job that checks out the repository, sets up Python 3.12.x, installs dependencies from requirements.txt, runs tests with pytest, logs in to Docker Hub, builds Docker images for ai-chatbot-framework_backend and ai-chatbot-framework_frontend, and pushes the images to Docker Hub with the provided credentials.
